positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial fox (kitsune) sitting gracefully on a crescent moon. The fox should have long, flowing, ethereal tails and pointed ears. The composition must be central, featuring clean silhouettes against a vibrant, deep indigo night sky filled with geometric nebula patterns and scattered glowing constellations. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print meeting contemporary vector illustration. Limited color palette of sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, black, and magenta. Strong contrast and high detail suitable for screen printing on fabric. Cinematic lighting, perfect for a t-shirt print.
negative: artifacts, blur, noisy, amateur drawing, low detail, text, signature, watermark, logo, brand name, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, bokeh
